title: Silly TNT Mod
description: Adds very silly and unique TNTs to your Minecraft experience!
body:
#  Welcome to the Silly TNT Mod!

**Silly TNT is a TNT Mod which is built on the Lucky TNT Lib. It adds over 50+ TNTs, Minecarts, and a few Dynamites to your TNT Experience**

_**Requires Lucky TNT Lib (luckytntlib-1.20-47.2.32.0)**_

![Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qumyJf4z/images/c34906a92ce49354f10695caa6d5783454543067.png)
There are a lot of new unique TNT such as:

- **Hot Potato TNT** (Spawns a cluster of dangerous Hot Potatoes, harmful to both mobs and players)
- **Enderman TNT** (Teleports randomly before detonating)
- **Plasma TNT** (Generates hazardous Plasma Blocks upon explosion)
- **EMP TNT** (Disables Redstone components over a large area)
- **Thermobaric TNT** (Triggers a massive fiery explosion)
- **Timber TNT** (Fells trees and drops logs)
- **Inversion TNT** (Reverses blocks, turning grass into stone, logs into leaves, etc.)
- **Girlfriend TNT** (…why?)

...and many more!
